channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Singer of Canadian anthem at 4 Nations Face-Off changes lyric to protest Trump's 51st state remarks
item.description: The anthem singer who performed the Canadian anthem prior to the 4 Nations Face-Off championship game Thursday night changed a lyric in “O Canada” as a response to U.S. President Donald Trump's repeated remarks about making the country the 51st state.
item.dc:creator: STEPHEN WHYNO and KEN POWTAK, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Trump gives Team USA pep talk before 4 Nations final vs Canada
item.description: President Donald Trump revealed his phone call with the U.S. Hockey Team, which was a motivational message delivered the way only Trump can.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Spurs star Victor Wembanyama to miss remainder of season after blood clot diagnosis
item.description: San Antonio star Victor Wembanyama's season is over after he was diagnosed with a blood clot in his right shoulder, a condition that will sideline one of the league's brightest stars and is the second massive health-related hit for the Spurs in a matter of months.
item.dc:creator: TIM REYNOLDS, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Former MLB pitcher Scott Sauerbeck dead at 53
item.description: The left-handed pitcher set the Pittsburgh Pirates record for most games pitched in a single season when he made 78 appearances in 2002.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: ESPN and Major League Baseball will end their national television deal after 2025 season
item.description: ESPN’s coverage of Major League Baseball games — at least in its current form — will conclude at the end of the 2025 season.
item.dc:creator: Joe Reedy, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Milwaukee's Bobby Portis suspended after he mistakenly took painkiller Tramadol rather than Toradol
item.description: The NBA suspended Milwaukee forward Bobby Portis Jr. for 25 games without pay on Thursday because he tested positive for the painkiller Tramadol, a violation of the league's anti-drug program.
item.dc:creator: TIM REYNOLDS, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Dodgers pitcher Bobby Miller hit in the head by a line drive, walks off field under own power
item.description: GLENDALE, Ariz. (AP) — Los Angeles Dodgers pitcher Bobby Miller was hit in the head by a line drive on Thursday during the team's spring training against the Chicago Cubs, but was able to walk off the field.
item.dc:creator: DAVID BRANDT, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: MLB sees very first challenge using Automatic Balls-Strikes system in spring training
item.description: For the first time in MLB history, a pitch was challenged using the new Automated Ball-Strikes system — and the call on the field was overturned.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: American fans lightly boo 'O Canada' before 4 Nations Face-Off title game
item.description: American fans lightly booed the Canadian national anthem and roared out their own Thursday night before the championship game of the 4 Nations Face-Off, a matchup between the United States and Canada that has taken on collateral importance in the wake of cross-border political animosity.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: While Manfred frets, some opposing players cheer the big-spending push of the Los Angeles Dodgers
item.description: GLENDALE, Ariz. (AP) — Baseball Commissioner Rob Manfred shared conflicting feelings about the big-spending Los Angeles Dodgers this week, praising the franchise's competitive spirit in one breath before worrying about the financial disparity they've created in the next.
item.dc:creator: DAVID BRANDT, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: 4 Nations Face-Off is the latest in a long line of memorable international hockey competitions
item.description: The 4 Nations Face-Off has already delivered an instant classic international hockey game with the fight-filled preliminary round matchup between the United States and Canada last week in Montreal. The U.S.-Canada rematch on Thursday night in Boston could be another memorable country vs.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: How Central Girls Wrestling reached the pinnacle of Colorado Wrestling
item.description:
Central Girls Wrestling, aka D51 Phoenix, featuring girls from all four D51 high schools, has done it.
They are the cream of the crop.
The top of the heap.
The best in the state.
They are the undisputed 5A State Champions.
item.dc:creator: Big Will Levenson, KREX 5

item.title: This rookie QB card could be worth $50K if you pull it from a new Topps set
item.description: Denver Broncos rookie quarterback Bo Nix impressed on the field, and now a Colorado sports card store is ready to pay $50,000 to keep a unique card featuring him close to home.
item.dc:creator: Spencer Kristensen, Fox 5

item.title: San Diego FC nabs first win in preseason match, debuts new jersey
item.description: San Diego FC took its first win in a preseason friendly match against the New York Red Bulls on Saturday, less than a day after the club unveiled its secondary "Community Kit" in the lead up to the team's highly-anticipated debut.
item.dc:creator: Danielle Dawson, Fox 5

item.title: William Byron avoids late wrecks to win 2nd straight Daytona 500 for Hendrick Motorsports
item.description: DAYTONA BEACH, Fla (AP) — William Byron fortuitously missed the ferocious wrecks down the stretch at the Daytona 500 that knocked out contenders racing for the checkered flag and left him with a repeat victory in sight.
item.dc:creator: DAN GELSTON, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: Stephen Curry captures MVP honors in All-Star Game at home, leads Shaq’s OGs to victory
item.description: SAN FRANCISCO (AP) — The final pregame introduction belonged to none other than Stephen Curry. The big MVP trophy at the end, Curry heaved that up into the air, too, in a fitting finish to his All-Star Game at home. His arena. His fans.
item.dc:creator: JANIE McCAULEY, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: William Byron avoids late wrecks to win 2nd straight Daytona 500
item.description: Ninth in the No. 24 Chevrolet with one lap left, Byron was in the right place by racing near the outside wall in overtime to became the first back-to-back winner since Denny Hamlin in 2019-20.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Padres baseball season in San Diego kicks off March 27 with opening series, East Village Block Party
item.description: The Padres are gearing up for the start of baseball season in San Diego and fans can get excited with the free East Village Block Party that takes place during opening weekend.
item.dc:creator: Anna Ashcraft, Fox 5
